reviews.comment:
Exelente servicio, shops y baños. Con el adicional del parque bosque para estirar las piernas!. Muy recomendable es el Vainilla late para beber

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, shops, and restrooms. Plus, there's a wooded park to stretch your legs! The Vanilla Latte is highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNk9fMWNREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de Servicio YPF con ACA ideal para parar a comer y cargar combustible con gran cantidad de surtidores en Ruta 2. Posee de todo, amplio espacio y hasta mesas de hormigón para comer afuera en un amplio parque!

(Translated by Google)
YPF service station with ACA, ideal for stopping for a meal and refueling with a large number of pumps on Route 2. It has everything, ample space, and even concrete tables for eating outside in a large park!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRZ3FETzl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
A pesar de las filas para cargar combustible, organizan muy bien la atención, habiendo personal suficiente

(Translated by Google)
Despite the lines to fill up with fuel, they organize the service very well, having enough staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOWQ3cldREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms. Good service. Very crowded due to peak season

reviews.comment:
Un Lugar muy Como Do.  Con juegos para niños.  Parrilla. Restaurante y bar de paso.

(Translated by Google)
A very comfortable place. With a children's play area, grill, restaurant, and bar.

reviews.comment:
Super recomendable, es la mejor para del camino, les recomiendo almorzar en la parrilla de Dolores.

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended, it's the best stop on the road. I recommend having lunch at the Dolores grill.

reviews.comment:
Siempre bien, limpio, y buena parrilla. También hay mesas al aire libre

(Translated by Google)
Always good, clean, and with great grilling. There are also outdoor tables.
